ApplicationInsights._comment: Connection string is supplied at runtime via Key Vault secret 'ApplicationInsights--ConnectionString' or the APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING env var. Do not commit it here.

AzureOpenAI._comment: Unified cognitive hub: this points at the single shared Azure AI Foundry resource 'po-aiservices-shared'. Endpoint and ApiKey are supplied at runtime via the Key Vault secrets 'PoPunkouterSoftware--AzureOpenAI--Endpoint' and 'PoPunkouterSoftware--AzureOpenAI--ApiKey' (never committed). Do not stand up a per-app Foundry resource.
